events.title: The Sundering
events.description: The world was torn asunder when the Elder Gods clashed, shattering the primordial continent into the five great lands. Mountains rose from the sea, rivers changed course, and the sky burned for a hundred years.

events.title: Awakening of the First Elves
events.description: In the twilight groves of Sylvaria, the first of the Elder Elves opened their eyes, born from the dreaming of the World Tree.

events.title: The Dragon Pact
events.description: Sometime between the Sundering and the Elven Awakening, the Great Wyrms forged a pact of non-interference with the mortal races. The details are lost to time.

events.title: The War of Crowns
events.description: A devastating 150-year conflict between the Seven Kingdoms for dominance over the central plains. Entire bloodlines were extinguished and ancient fortresses reduced to rubble.

children.title: Siege of Ironhold
children.description: The mighty fortress of Ironhold fell after a year-long siege, marking the first major victory of the Southern Alliance.

children.title: Battle of the Crimson Field
children.description: The bloodiest single battle in Eldorian history. Over 40,000 warriors fell in a single day.

children.title: Treaty of Ashenmere
children.description: The exhausted kingdoms finally agreed to peace, dividing the central plains among the surviving three kingdoms.

events.title: Founding of the Arcane Academy
events.description: The greatest minds of the age gathered in the Floating Citadel to establish the first formal school of magic, codifying spellcraft for generations to come.

events.title: The Dark Rising
events.description: The Necromancer King Malachar rose from his forgotten tomb, unleashing a plague of undeath across the northern kingdoms.

events.title: The Starfall Prophecy
events.description: An unnamed seer foretold that a child born under falling stars would end the reign of darkness. The exact date was never recorded.

events.title: Rise of the Lightbringer
events.description: Year Zero. A humble farmer's child, marked by starlight, united the fractured kingdoms and defeated the Necromancer King in single combat atop the Spire of Shadows.

events.title: The Golden Age
events.description: Seven centuries of unprecedented peace, artistic flowering, and magical advancement. The great cathedrals and sky-bridges were built during this era.

children.title: Construction of the Sky Bridges
children.description: Magical bridges spanning hundreds of miles were built, connecting the five great cities.

children.title: The Great Library Founded
children.description: All knowledge of the realm was gathered into a single magnificent structure.

events.title: The Second Sundering
events.description: A catastrophic magical experiment gone wrong tore a rift between worlds, flooding Eldoria with creatures from beyond the veil.

events.title: The Restoration Begins
events.description: After the Second Sundering, the surviving peoples began the slow process of rebuilding. The exact date is disputed among scholars.
